tool_purpose: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern. The patterns should be glob-style patterns that match paths relative to the working directory. Use pattern like '*.ext' to match files in current directory, and '**/*.ext' to match files in all subdirectories. Returns full paths to all matching items. Great for finding files when you do not know their exact location. Only searches within allowed directories.

path.description: Base directory to search within an allowed directory.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Base directory to search within an allowed directory.
